title: Have you or someone you know tried this?
body:
Hey everyone! My mom is stage 4 NSCLC with Mets to lymph nodes in chest, the sac of the heart, and to the bones at C7. Let’s back up a couple months… before it Mets to the bone- she wasn’t a candidate for radiation due to the area being to large to radiate it. She did the four rounds of carbo, pem, pem; tumors had shrunk over 50% now they have finished the four rounds and the cancer is spreading aggressively. They are going to do palliative radiation to the lymph node in her neck that is pressing on her esophagus and growing into the spine at C7. This whole ride has been extremely painful for her. They offered a clinical trial ‘TILS’ which she thought about but she said she is tired. Me and my mom live together, she is my best friend; I cannot imagine this world without her. As much as I want her to do everything possible, I know that’s not a guarantee. I respect her wishes and I will continue to be strong for her. 

Gosh I am sorry for the run on. To get to the real point of my post today. We are in the ER for a critical high calcium level and one of the nurses said his mom has small cell lung cancer and she swears by Soursop and that is how she has been in remission for five years. The nurse also said he knows a doctor  who swears by lions mane mushrooms and that it saved him as he continues to be in remission. 

Has anyone tried this Soursop or/and lions mane mushrooms? If so what brand/manufacturer? 

Mama wants to try these things and of course we won’t stop praying for a miracle. We know cancer does not come from God but he can take it away if it is his will.
